g.text: SD: Issue 6 - Register an SNS User
starts the registration of a new SNS user
requests data (Name, Address, Phone, SNS Number, CC, Birth Date, Sex [Optional])
registerSNSUser(snsNumber, name, address, birthDate, phone, cc, sex)
informs validation error (e.g., duplicate SNS or invalid PT format)
create(snsNumber, name, address, birthDate, phone, cc, sex)
